answer:
Alright, so I’d like to talk about the smartphone. Honestly, it’s wild to think about just how much it’s changed our everyday lives. Back in the day, before smartphones were a thing, people used landlines to chat, wrote letters, or had to meet face-to-face if they wanted to catch up. If you needed directions, you’d whip out a paper map—remember those? And if you wanted to know what was happening in the world, you pretty much had to wait for the newspaper or tune into the evening news.

Now, with smartphones, everything is literally at our fingertips. You can video call someone halfway across the planet, order food, hail a ride, watch movies, and keep up with the news—all while waiting in line at the grocery store. Social media has made it super easy to stay connected, not just with friends but with global communities and even celebrities.

The biggest change, in my opinion, is how instant everything’s become. We’re more connected than ever, which is awesome, but it also means we’re almost always online and reachable. Of course, that’s a double-edged sword, but there’s no denying that the smartphone has totally revolutionized the way society functions.
title:
Discuss how a particular invention has changed society. 
What is the invention? 
How did society function before this invention? 
What are the biggest changes it has caused?

2. 理由/案例1
One major reason is that [name of invention] has transformed the way we [specific aspect of life].  
For example, before the introduction of [name of invention], people used to [describe previous methods or ways of living], which often led to [mention any limitations, challenges, or inefficiencies]. But with the advent of [name of invention], there have been major changes such as [list and briefly describe the biggest changes].

3. 理由/案例2  
Also, I think what stands out about [name of invention] is how it has affected areas like [mention other aspects of society: education, business, relationships, etc.].  
I mean, the way [name of invention] has improved [specific area] is just impressive.  
For example, [give a real-life example illustrating how the invention has transformed daily life or a specific field].  
Of course, some people might say [Potential Counterpoint], but I still believe [Restate Your Point].

4. 总结
So, overall, I’d say [name of invention] has truly revolutionized the way society operates, making [summarize the main positive effects].
